denominator_explanation: Kickstarter backers are a self-selected funnel; the full addressable market is unmeasured.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
creator_audience_bias: large pre-existing fanbase inflates the buyer count vs a neutral market
reviewer_notes: Maximal honest mapping: record the verified paid anchor only; the three non-buyer buckets are unobservable from a backer-only sample.
not_approved_note: PROPOSAL ONLY — not human-approved until the candidate's reviewer_checklist is completed and the factory promotion gates pass.
